scope: Lane B static verification for CLIProxyAPI first-pass multi-model selector direction in worker-2 worktree

checks.name: Helper defaults to CLIProxyAPI data plane
checks.detail: Default provider/model/base_url/env_key are cliproxyapi, cliproxyapi/default, http://127.0.0.1:8317/v1, and CLIPROXYAPI_PROXY_CLIENT_KEY.

checks.name: Helper separates data-plane and management keys
checks.detail: CLIPROXYAPI_MANAGEMENT_KEY is refused as a Codex data-plane env_key.

checks.name: Helper dry-run and append behavior covered
checks.detail: Unit tests verify dry-run target preservation, append write, and duplicate append refusal.

checks.name: Docs supersede OpenCodex 10100 guidance
checks.detail: README and first-pass report point to CLIProxyAPI 8317 plus bridge/BFF and bubble path.

checks.name: No live routing or credential claim
checks.detail: Verification does not require live CLIProxyAPI credentials, generated app bundles, or proprietary artifacts.
